name: AQC_Unlock
description: DSM 7 package that allows you to use non-Synology 10GbE, 5GbE and 2.5GbE PCIe network cards that have a Marvell (Aquantia) AQC100, AQC107, AQC108, AQC111, AQC112, AQC113/AQC113C/AQC113CS and AQC115 chip, and set your preferred LAN port order for DSM to connect to other devices.

synology.arch: avoton broadwell broadwellnk broadwellnkv2 broadwellntbap bromolow denverton epyc7002 epyc7003 grantley icelaked purley r1000 r1000nk v1000 v1000nk
